note: All debut-volume manga (no light novels) releasing this month and next per otakucalendar.com, ranked against your collection. Covers link to Barnes & Noble.

items.meta: Jul 14 · VIZ Media · queer anti-colonial seinen
items.why: Queer, anti-colonial seinen with religious-horror edges — dead center of your Summer Hikaru Died / Blue Period lane.
VIZ slice-of-life romcom in the Skip and Loafer / Bocchi comfort zone.

items.meta: Aug 4 · Manga UP! Global · GL-leaning romance
items.why: Role-reversal romance with a real GL current — feeds the yuri streak.
Classic Fuan no Tane J-horror vignettes — straight onto the horror shelf.
Koshien-reunion BL with a real sports-manga core — BL that earns it on story.
Io Sakisaka (Ao Haru Ride) doing polished shoujo romance; clean art, easy read.

items.t: Mistress Kanan is Devilishly Easy (Omnibus), Vol. 1
items.why: Supernatural romcom gag series in a 2-in-1 omnibus — light but fun.
Cozy fantasy-adventure with a vet-school hook; charming Kodansha debut.
Masamune Shirow's cyberpunk seinen landmark in a deluxe omnibus — pricey but foundational.

items.t: You Might As Well Be the One, Vol. 1
items.why: College-set romance about being misread; grounded slice-of-life romcom.
Firefighter-reunion BL manhwa; on story strength this one's got a hook.
Cozy predator/prey slice-of-life with gentle Days on Fes energy.

items.t: I'm Fine With Being the Second Girlfriend, Vol. 1
items.meta: Jul 14 · Seven Seas · mature romance / ecchi
items.why: Mature love-triangle romance with ecchi edges (Ghost Ship imprint).
Moody shoujo fantasy-mystery where humans are the endangered species.

items.t: The Bubble Love of the Mermaid, Vol. 1
items.why: Romantic fantasy from the My Happy Marriage author; sweeter, softer fare.

items.t: Marriage to the Wolf: An Interspecies Union, Vol. 1
items.why: Interspecies arranged-marriage BL — only if the furry-romance angle grabs you.

items.meta: Jul 14 · Seven Seas · cozy cat slice-of-life
items.why: Pure cozy cat gag manga — cute, low-stakes filler.
Sequel to the leveling juggernaut; big action, but grind-fantasy isn't your lane.

items.t: Not Your Typical Reincarnation Story, Vol. 1
items.meta: Jul 14 · Ize Press · reincarnation romance manhwa
items.why: Reincarnation romance manhwa — well outside your wheelhouse.
